history.subject: Information about your new Google Account
history.summary: Johan has created a new Google Account, granting him access to Google products, apps, and services. He is advised to review and confirm his privacy and security options. The email provides information about the Google terms of service, YouTube terms of service, and additional terms related to various services. Johan is informed about his legal right to withdraw from the contract within 14 days of conclusion. Google's contact details are provided for this purpose. He is also reminded that replies to the email are not monitored, and any questions can be directed to the Help Center.
tasks: Review and confirm privacy and security options for the new Google Account
Read and understand the Google terms of service
Read and understand the YouTube terms of service
Read and understand the additional terms related to various services
Understand the legal right to withdraw from the contract within 14 days of conclusion
Direct any questions to the Help Center

history.subject: Beveiligingsmelding
history.summary: The email is a security notification from Google, indicating that a new phone number has been added for two-step verification on the recipient's account. If the recipient did not make this change, it implies that someone else may be using their account. The recipient is advised to check and secure their account.
tasks: Review the new phone number added for two-step verification
Check and secure the account if the change was not made by the recipient

history.subject: Tweestapsverificatie aangezet
history.summary: The two-step verification has been activated for the Google account jovanerkel@gmail.com. When logging in from a new or untrusted device, a second factor will be required for identity verification. It's suggested to add a backup phone number or obtain backup codes for use when the second factor is not available. The settings for two-step verification can be checked and modified if necessary. Security activity can also be monitored.
tasks: Activate two-step verification for Google account
Log in from a new or untrusted device with second factor for identity verification
Add a backup phone number or obtain backup codes for use when the second factor is not available
Check and modify settings for two-step verification if necessary
